case_title: ANA RODAS VS. COURTNEY WING et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER STRIKING FILING DUE TO INVALID CHECK
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-09-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
INVALID/RETURNED CHECK FOR TRANSACTION B6203910F006 FOR COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODAS, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT WING, COURTNEY DOES 1 TO 200 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-09-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-10-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-24-2003
COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER STRICKEN BY COURT ORDER FOR FAILURE TO REDEEM INVALID CHECK FOR TRANSACTION B6203910F006; NO FURTHER FILINGS ON PART OF RODAS, ANA
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL BY ACCOUNTING ON ORDER STRIKING FILING DUE TO INVALID CHECK ON TX B6203910F006.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

***NOTICE OF INVALID CHECK AND CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON NOTICE OF INVALID CHECK SENT TO DANIEL EISAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $135.30 REPRESENTING COMPLAINT ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2003, TX # B6203910F006. FUTURE FILINGS OF DANIEL EISAN ON CASH BASIS ONLY UNTIL BAD CHECK IS REDEEMED.***
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
